[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111111 a
1 0110111011 7
2 0010011101 5
3 0000010101 3
4 1110000111 6
5 0101010110 5
6 1001010101 5
7 1101110110 7

67 76 0010001100 3
70 07 1110010010 5
